meta.title: AI Video Workflow Campaign Mood Board
meta.summary: Eleven generated visual references for a campaign around an AI video production workflow, shaped by inventive energy, product moments, and heritage craft.
meta.briefAssumption: No external campaign brief was supplied. The board treats the current workspace product identity as the campaign subject: a project-agnostic AI video production workflow package for turning scripts into Seedance/Higgsfield shotlist assets.

signals.goal: Make the workflow feel inventive, tactile, and production-ready without looking like generic software marketing.
signals.audience: Creative operators, directors, producers, and AI-video builders evaluating a structured production workflow.
brand_inputs: Workspace identity from AGENTS.md: file-based AI video creation workflow package
signals.palette_direction: warm paper, graphite, black ink, brushed metal, amber light, restrained signal colors
visual_principles: treat the workflow as a craft table, not a glossy SaaS dashboard
show modern AI video production through tangible scenes and tools
balance analog filmmaking heritage with precise digital systems
make every tile one composed photograph or material detail

items.title: Shotlist Bench
items.caption: A tactile product moment: structured shot planning moving from paper to a luminous preview surface.
items.source: Generated from qualified moodboard intake and workspace identity.
items.motif: script pages, shot cards, preview monitor, production desk
items.prompt: Single editorial photograph of a cinematic AI video production desk where a director's hands arrange blank shot cards beside a glowing monitor showing abstract film frames, warm paper texture, graphite pencils, brushed metal tools, amber desk light, heritage film craft meeting modern production software, no readable text, no logos. Single coherent frame, one composed scene or object detail, not a collage, not a grid, not a contact sheet, not a scrapbook, not a mood board layout.
